what_it_does: Defines the organizational conventions, folder layout, naming scheme, tagging rules, traceability requirements, token/address machinery, deterministic analysis mechanisms, and self-maintenance discipline for a scalable design mockup corpus that links every view to real application features and code.
observations: Generated files (design-system.css, index.html, element-map.json, refcheck-report.json, code-symbols.json, code-edges.json) are explicitly marked as never hand-edited; they are regenerated from source-of-truth JSON files by scripts.
The corpus follows an extend-by-registration pattern for tokens, addresses, and analysis mechanisms.
Traceability is bidirectional: mockups link to features and code via register.json represents/coverage, metadata comments in HTML, and vault wikilinks.
Every meaningful mockup element carries a data-ui-ref="ui://..." address that mirrors the running app's UI addressing scheme.
Analysis mechanisms are Layer-0: deterministic, free, no models; a local-model layer augments them later.

Three registered mechanisms are described: code-ref-validator (forward drift), code-symbol-registry (reverse index with optional semantic nearest), and code-dependency-graph (structural symbol→symbol edges).
Self-maintenance requires updating this file and CLAUDE.md as part of every system change.
Responsive/mobile-native mockups are mandatory where the platform list requires them.
Status flow is planned→drafting→drafted→quality-passed→approved; 'grounded' is a feature-reality property, not a status value.
standouts: The design folder is treated as a self-describing repository with generated artifacts and a registry of deterministic checks.
A universal code://<file-stem>/<symbol> coordinate is reused across both the reverse symbol index and the dependency graph.
check.py can act as a build gate by scanning app source for off-token literals and exiting non-zero.
symbols.py degrades gracefully with a loud warning when the semantic embedder at :8001 is unreachable.
conventions: Generated files are produced from source-of-truth JSONs and are never hand-edited.
Mockup files follow the naming pattern <id>-<slug>-<platform>.html/.jpeg.
Every mockup links ../design-system.css and carries data-ui-ref addresses.
Changes to mockups require updating register.json and re-running gallery.py.
Self-describing metadata comment blocks appear at the top of each mockup HTML file.
concerns: The system depends heavily on manual registration discipline; drift is likely if agents forget to update register.json, re-run scripts, or sync CLAUDE.md.
The semantic-nearest feature relies on an external embedder at :8001 with no fallback beyond a warning.
References to 'AGENTS rule 9' and 'FORM gate' are not explained within this file.
The number of generated artifacts and interdependent scripts implies significant local tooling complexity not validated here.
notes: This is the operating manual for the design corpus: how mockups, tokens, addresses, and deterministic analysis mechanisms stay consistent and traceable to real code.
questions: What is the exact schema of register.json, tokens.json, addresses.json, and mechanisms.json?
Where is CLAUDE.md located and what does it contain?
What specifically do 'AGENTS rule 9' and 'FORM gate' require?
How are feature-ids assigned and what is the schema of the Feature & Function Inventory?
What is the precise resolution algorithm for ambiguous bare names in codeedges.py?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file states it documents how the corpus is organized, structured, and tagged, and the content is exactly that.
apparent_themes: Single sources of truth with generated artifacts
Deterministic Layer-0 analysis with optional model augmentation
intention_signals: To transform a static mockup folder into a machine-navigable, analyzable design substrate that can be validated against the real codebase and extended by adding registry entries rather than editing machinery.
novelty: A design corpus managed like a database: mockups are registered, addressable, linked to code symbols through a universal code:// coordinate, and analyzed by a registry of deterministic mechanisms with a separate model-augmented semantic layer.
contribution: Provides the governance rules and structural contract that keep generated design artifacts, registries, and code traceability aligned; a fused system would keep its conventions for naming, tagging, regeneration, and Layer-0 mechanism registration.
summary_for_embedding: company/design/conventions.md is the conventions document that specifies the folder layout, naming, tagging, traceability, token/address machinery, deterministic analysis mechanisms, and self-maintenance rules for a scalable design mockup corpus linked to real application features and code.
intention_for_embedding: It was written to make the design corpus self-describing, machine-analyzable, and traceable to real code through generated artifacts and extend-by-registration mechanisms.
